MECH_test_time_training_refines_color_sp.gloss: Test-time training refines color and spatial arrangement, adapting to task transformations.

MECH_na_ve_1d_patch_sequencing_loses.gloss: Naïve 1D patch sequencing loses 2D structure, necessitating 2D positional embeddings.

MECH_offline_training_enables_learning_v.gloss: Offline training enables learning visual common sense, improving TTT.

MECH_canvas_enables_augmentations_foster.gloss: Canvas enables augmentations, fostering translation/scale invariance for generalization.

MECH_visual_learning_directly_yields_abs.gloss: Visual learning directly yields abstraction/inference, no language needed.

MECH_canvas_patchification_increases_inp.gloss: Canvas patchification increases input diversity, reducing overfitting and encouraging spatial prior learning.

ASM_excessively_large_models_current_set.gloss: Excessively large models in current settings lead to overfitting.

MECH_increasing_model_size_improves_accu.gloss: Increasing model size improves accuracy by enabling better fitting.

MECH_patchification_convolution_introduc.gloss: Patchification/convolution introduces locality and translation invariance inductive biases.

ASM_some_arc_tasks_have_multiple_plausib.gloss: Some ARC tasks have multiple plausible explanations/rules.

MECH_attention_masks_encourage_foregroun.gloss: Attention masks encourage foreground focus, improving accuracy.

MECH_average_pooling_aggregates_predicti.gloss: Average pooling aggregates predictions for raw grid locations.

MECH_model_handles_ambiguity_proposing_m.gloss: Model handles ambiguity by proposing multiple rule interpretations.

ASM_single_pixel_error_invalidates_entir.gloss: Single pixel error invalidates entire ARC prediction.

ASM_multi_view_inference_cost_negligible.gloss: Multi-view inference cost is negligible compared to TTT.

ASM_multiple_unseen_tasks_cannot_assumed.gloss: Multiple unseen tasks cannot be assumed simultaneously.

MECH_some_tasks_solvable_from_scratch_ta.gloss: Some tasks are solvable from scratch (tabula rasa).

MECH_attention_maps_reveal_pixel_pixel_r.gloss: Attention maps reveal pixel-to-pixel reasoning relationships.

MECH_majority_voting_consolidates_predic.gloss: Majority voting consolidates predictions from different views.

MECH_later_layer_attention_reflects_rule.gloss: Later layer attention reflects rule for extending pixels.

MECH_correct_predictions_exist_views_but.gloss: Correct predictions exist in views but are outvoted.

MECH_task_embedding_visualization_sugges.gloss: Task embedding visualization suggests learning inter-task relations.

MECH_early_layer_attention_reflects_patt.gloss: Early layer attention reflects pattern core influence.
